message:
fix(auth): sanitize commands before sending to panes during restart

The agent restart orchestrator was sending the generated agent command
directly to tmux without sanitization. This could allow shell injection
if the command template contained malicious content or if model names/
project directories contained shell metacharacters.

Changes:
- Use tmux.SanitizePaneCommand() to validate command before sending
- Use tmux.BuildPaneCommand() to properly construct the cd + command
  sequence, ensuring the agent starts in the correct project directory
- Errors from sanitization now prevent the restart instead of sending
  potentially dangerous commands

This hardens the restart flow against:
- Shell injection via malicious project directory paths
- Unexpected shell expansion in command templates
- Commands with embedded shell metacharacters

The same pattern should be followed anywhere agent commands are
constructed from potentially untrusted input.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
